name: Gaseous Form
description: A willing creature you touch (and its gear) becomes a misty cloud with a Fly Speed of 10 feet (can hover), Resistance to Bludgeoning/Piercing/Slashing, Advantage on STR/DEX/CON saves, and immunity to the Prone condition, but can't take actions, speak, or manipulate objects. Ends at 0 HP or as a Magic action. Engine: the gaseous transformation is descriptive only.
